ab: Yaku mptusa saya pa dsun maku lmiqu.
ch: A:老師我今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Rmngaw ka bubu u kari bay preykay ka lmiqu.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: Yaku mptusa saya hay dsun maku qnpahan.
ch: A:老師我今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: Musa ta tnburah ddxral hu?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: Mmosa ta inu ka saya?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Dsanun ta na siyaw yayung ka mptusa.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: Mmosa ta inu ka saya?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Dsanun ta na lmiqu ka mptusa.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: Mmosa ta siyaw yayung ka saya hu?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Uxay, dsun ta na lmiqu ka mptusa.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: Mmosa ta lmiqu ka saya hu?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Uxay wah! Musa ta qnpahan ka saya.
ch: B:不是喔!我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Mptusa, musa ta siyaw yayung qmita manu?
ch: B+:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: Msupu ta musa qmita tiyadan.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Mptusa, musa ta lmiqu qmita manu?
ch: B+:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: Musa ta mita tlaway.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: Manu ka ddaun ta musa qnpahan?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: Musa ta qnpahan qmita pnhuma ta lhngay, qdahang niqan uyah mi tdiyung wah!
ch: A:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Mptusa! Musa ta tmapaq qsiya yayung hu?
ch: B+:老師!我們要到河流游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Uxay, musa ta qmita tiyadan.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Mptusa! Musa ta qnpahan phuma sama hu?
ch: B+:老師!我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: Musa ta tnburah dxral ka saya.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Niqan tiyadan sskaya ka hiya.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Saya ka hana ku mita mnudus bay tiyadan.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Niqan tlaway ka sskaya hiya.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Ibah! Ibah! Snkuxul ku tlaway, malu bay qtan.
ch: B:Ibah! Ibah! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Niqan tlaway sskaya ka hiya.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Uxay tlaway ka way, walu ka way.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Eniq hini qmita, iya usa thiyaq balay nniqan wah!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: Iyaq, uxay nami musa thiyaq balay nniqan.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Iya ttalang, thuway mksa, tkuray su balay.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Iyux ku nhari qmita.
en: I want to see them right away.
